column.name: TXNAM_ADR
column.description: Text name for form text module short address

column.description: Text name for form text module letter header

column.description: Text name for formula text module footer lines

column.description: Text name for form text module: Greeting

column.description: Text names for layout-set module SDS sender

column.description: Customization of SD Input Help Entries
